untranslatable_reason: This signal is calendar/event-based (presidential election cycle) and cannot be expressed using technical price indicators, moving averages, or oscillators from the allowed indicator list. The entry and exit conditions require date-based logic tied to the 4-year U.S. presidential election cycle, which is outside the scope of technical analysis indicators. A backtest engine would need custom calendar event handling or external date logic to implement this rule.
translation_notes: Signal KAUFMAN_DRY_11 describes a political/calendar anomaly pattern rather than a technical trading signal. The rule requires: (1) identifying the current year within the 4-year presidential term, (2) triggering entry on October 1 of year 3, and (3) holding through the end of year 4. None of the allowed indicators can express these date/calendar conditions. This would require a custom event handler or macro calendar input to the backtest engine.
